hero.name: Gonzalo Zurita
hero.description: QA Automation Engineer with 5+ years specializing in FinTech and enterprise cloud platforms. Experienced in building scalable automation and CI/CD validation pipelines, API and backend testing, and data/ETL verification. I design data-driven QA strategies and leverage automation and AI-assisted workflows to reduce defects, speed releases, and improve reliability for complex enterprise systems.

sections.professional_development_note: These are current, ongoing learning topics and courses I'm actively studying.
sections.interests_note: Looking for opportunities focused on modern QA practices, automation engineering, AI-assisted testing, backend quality assurance, and scalable enterprise validation processes.

schedule_note: See my availability and create a Google Calendar event.

experiences.company_meta: Ingram Micro - Xvantage | July 2024 - Present | Barcelona, Spain
experiences.note: Ingram Micro is a global technology distributor and Xvantage is their digital platform for cloud and IT solutions.
bullets: Implemented a full automation framework for ETL testing, integrating it into CI/CD pipelines and regression suites — resulting in fewer production incidents and improved release stability.
Performed end-to-end testing for enterprise subscription management platforms and reseller provisioning systems, increasing release confidence for key deployments.
Designed and executed ETL validation and automation initiatives focused on data quality, transformation testing, and backend verification.
Accelerated test creation and analysis by adopting AI-assisted workflows and intelligent agent-based tooling.
Executed backend, API, integration, and enterprise-level system testing across multiple internal platform components.
Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to identify automation opportunities and improve QA efficiency across releases.

experiences.note: Rootstrap is a software development agency; Caramel and Unpress are client-facing platforms I contributed to during this period.
bullets: Served as QA Engineer and Product Owner for Unpress, coordinating product requirements and QA deliverables.
Led QA efforts for web and mobile features: defined acceptance criteria, designed test strategies, and created automation scenarios integrated into CI/CD pipelines.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams, prioritized backlog items, and translated product goals into verifiable engineering tasks.
Performed frontend, backend, API, and mobile testing across Android and iOS, and supported production issue triage and resolution.
Mentored junior testers and improved QA workflows, enabling faster release cycles and greater release confidence.

experiences.note: Fligoo is an AI/analytics company; Broadridge is a global fintech leader in investor communications and technology.
bullets: Managed estimations, QA reporting, planning activities, and testing documentation.
Worked closely with Product Owners and Project Managers on analytical and QA initiatives.
Supervised deployments and testing activities in production environments.
Participated in enterprise validation processes and quality assurance operations.
Used Cypress to automate frontend validations and UI testing for web applications.

experiences.note: QA for a major financial services engagement with Ernst & Young. Began as Quality Analyst and was promoted to Quality Assurance Lead, combining hands-on testing with client reporting and team coordination.
bullets: Promoted from Quality Analyst to Quality Assurance Lead; managed estimations, reporting, and QA planning across project streams.
Presented test findings and status to client stakeholders and coordinated cross-team testing strategy.
Designed and executed test cases (exploratory, smoke, regression) validating critical financial workflows.
Mentored testing analysts, delegated tasks, and improved QA processes to increase delivery reliability.
Worked with development teams to triage defects, verify fixes, and reduce rework during releases.

experiences.company_meta: COHEN Sistemas | Claro Argentina · Feb 2019 - Aug 2019
experiences.note: Testing analyst for the customer service software development team supporting Claro in Argentina, Uruguay and Paraguay; provided analysis and execution of manual and automated tests to ensure release quality.
bullets: Executed manual and automated tests for customer service platforms.
Provided QA support across regional teams (Argentina, Uruguay, Paraguay).
Assisted in test analysis, defect reporting and verification.
